home.eyebrow: striver never give up / luo fangzheng
home.introLabel: i always say / 一直相信
home.introBody:
Refusing to be shaped by labels or limits. Every step forward becomes proof of growing stronger, freer, and closer to the person I choose to become.
不囿名限，步步为证：更强，也更自由。
home.specimenCaptionText:
undefined, unbound, always forward
不被定义，持续向前

notes.title: AI product, not only prompts
notes.body:
I care about the full path around a model: user scene, context, workflow, output structure, failure state and what the user does next.
我更关心模型外侧的场景、上下文、流程和下一步。

notes.title: buildable MVP first
notes.body:
My strongest proof point is runnable work: React interfaces, account isolation, data persistence, API calls, RAG documents and usable demos.
能运行的作品，比抽象描述更有说服力。

notes.title: RAG needs product context
notes.body:
Documents are not decoration. They should help the product remember project background, reduce vague answers and make meeting outputs more consistent.
资料库应该帮产品记住背景，并稳定输出。

notes.title: delivery includes writing
notes.body:
I like turning fuzzy bugs, product ideas and AI behavior into clear records that developers, users and reviewers can act on.
把模糊问题写清楚，也是交付的一部分。

experiments.title: AI Office Agent Assistant
experiments.body:
A runnable office-skill workspace evolved from meeting memory: login, RAG library, Agent Plan, structured skill output, output records and feedback iteration.
围绕真实办公场景，把 Agent 计划、技能执行和结果沉淀连成闭环。
experiments.ctaLabel: Open and try the live workspace

preview.title: Agent Plan -> Skill Run -> Output Record

highlights: Built the React/Vite workspace, sidebar flow and core skill pages.
Wrapped Express APIs for plan, run, output records and feedback.
Used PocketBase for auth, account isolation and persistent AI outputs.

experiments.title: Learning Support System
experiments.body:
A learning-assistance system for scattered study materials, knowledge-point organization, basic retrieval and topic-based review paths.
面向分散学习材料，用知识点和检索把复习路径组织起来。
highlights: Implemented Vue interaction pages and coordinated backend API integration.
Worked with Spring Boot and MySQL data structures for study content.
Introduced RAG-style knowledge slices for Q&A and study suggestions.

experiments.title: challenge cup pages
experiments.body:
Prototype and presentation pages shaped around user value, feature hierarchy, homepage modules, product explanation and demo delivery.
把价值表达、功能层级和演示流程先搭成可讲清的页面。

preview.title: Showcase page in progress
preview.footer: More detail will be added after cleanup

highlights: Organized product explanation around scenario, value and feature hierarchy.
Prepared page modules for prototype presentation and demo delivery.

experiments.title: interface iteration
experiments.body:
Internal management-system page adjustments, feature testing, API coordination, issue reproduction and pre-release verification.
在真实业务页面里处理迭代、联调、复现和发布前检查。

preview.title: Interface fixes, tests and release checks
preview.footer: Continuing to turn work notes into public cases

highlights: Handled interface adjustments and interaction checks in real workflow pages.
Coordinated API behavior, issue reproduction and pre-release verification.
More complete write-up is still being refined.

connect.title: talk about AI products.
connect.body:
For conversations around AI agents, enterprise AI products, product thinking, and real-world implementation, feel free to reach me by email.
如果您想就人工智能代理、企业人工智能产品、产品思维和实际应用等话题进行交流，欢迎随时通过电子邮件与我联系。
